examples: He's travelled widely, chiefly in Africa and Asia.
We are chiefly concerned with improving educational standards.
He joined the consular service in China, chiefly because this was one of the few job vacancies.
Banks are horrified at the idea, chiefly because it will introduce more volatility into their earnings.
One thing Stimpson didn't change: a bias toward finding geniuses chiefly from the left.
